{% extends "pages/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block content %}

{% trans "Libros sobre Agricultura" %}

{% if error %}
{{ error }}
{% endif %}
{% for book in books %}
{% if book.volumeInfo.imageLinks %} {% endif %}
{{ book.volumeInfo.title }}
{{ book.volumeInfo.authors|join:", " }}

{{ book.volumeInfo.description|truncatechars:200 }}

{% if book.volumeInfo.infoLink %} {% trans "Ver más"%} {% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% endblock %}
